name: Side Bridge
instructions: Lie on your side on a mat with your legs straight and stacked on top of each other. Place your forearm on the mat directly below your shoulder so your elbow is at a 90-degree angle, with your forearm perpendicular to your body. This is the starting position.

Engaging your core and obliques, lift your hips off the floor until your body forms a straight line from head to feet. Only your forearm and the side of your bottom foot should be in contact with the floor.
Hold this position while breathing normally, keeping your hips level and your body in a straight line. Do not let your hips sag toward the floor or pike upward.
Lower your hips back to the floor in a controlled manner.
Complete all repetitions or hold time on one side before switching to the other side.
